comment.body:
... i came back from the doctor..

plp like Juventino here, kept asking me "wen bloodbath" etc. for days now. 
catching the temporal bottom, and saying that "AFTER march opex, but rather after jpm expo" is not enough... especially when I emphatize that "I'm not sure about the timing"
They can't distinguish between an overall bias, and intraday noise. (and yes, if i open a put at 5780 and the market falls below 5500 then it prints a lot... lol, pathetic)
You have macro structure and micro structure. 

Btw, if you watch the RV as I said, you can see that RV is down the whole day.
This is crucial. 
Some plp will try to explain this bounce with negative gamma, but in fact, if it would have been the negative gamma exposure, then vol would be up, not down. 
In my weekly post I hinted, that some funds are speculating buying on Monday... this is happening, but the market is still down. its not bullish. It is bullish if it stabilizes above that very far lvl I marked. 
Market is still 200 pts down.

These times are trappy and crazy. 
As said in a funny way, if you don't have a clear vision, just avoid trading. 
You have to be able to admit when you can't "feel" the market, and then jsut sit on the hands and wait for the setup...
....and never short the bottom... golden rule
